setup-worktree-unix: if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci; elif [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then yarn install --frozen-lockfile; elif [ -f bun.lock ] || [ -f bun.lockb ]; then bun install; fi
if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then python -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
setup-worktree-windows: if exist %ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH%\.env if not exist .env copy %ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH%\.env .env
